title: How to reset your password
content: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Follow the instructions sent to your email.

title: VPN setup guide for remote work
content:
1. Download the VPN client from the IT portal.
2. Install and launch the application.
3. Enter your credentials when prompted.
4. Select the appropriate server location.
5. Click Connect.

title: Troubleshooting printer issues
content:
If your printer is not working:

1. Check that the printer is powered on and connected.
2. Verify there is paper and toner/ink.
3. Restart the print spooler service.
4. Try removing and re-adding the printer.
5. Contact IT if issues persist.

title: Microsoft Teams installation
content: Download Teams from the Microsoft website or your software center. Run the installer and sign in with your company email.

title: Email signature configuration
content:
To configure your email signature in Outlook:
1. Go to File > Options > Mail > Signatures
2. Click New and name your signature
3. Design your signature using the editor
4. Set it as default for new messages
5. Click OK to save

title: Software license renewal process
content:
When your software license is about to expire:
1. Submit a ticket 30 days in advance
2. Include the software name and current license key
3. Provide business justification for renewal
4. Wait for approval from your manager
5. IT will process the renewal and update your license
